mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_audit_log (trace_id, user_id, tenant_id, api_path, status_code, consume_quota, request_tokens, response_tokens, cost_ms, error_msg, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.traceId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.apiPath}, #{item.statusCode}, #{item.consumeQuota}, #{item.requestTokens}, #{item.responseTokens}, #{item.costMs}, #{item.errorMsg}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN status_code = 200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN status_code != 200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failedCalls, SUM(consume_quota) as totalTokens, SUM(request_tokens) as requestTokens, SUM(response_tokens) as responseTokens, AVG(cost_ms) as avgLatency FROM api_audit_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
